title: hordeum murinum subsp. secalinum
intro: Hordeum murinum subsp. secalinum, also known as false barley or wild barley, is a subspecies of wild grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hordeum murinum subsp. secalinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Hordeum murinum subsp. secalinum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
